metadata.title: T1PKS/NRPS Biosynthesis Pathway Collection
metadata.description: Structured database of Type I PKS and NRPS biosynthetic pathways from MIBiG entries, curated from Actinomycetes-derived BGCs
metadata.source: MIBiG (Minimum Information about a Biosynthetic Gene cluster)

fields.biosynthetic_class: PKS (Type I/Unknown/Iterative), NRPS, or hybrid; subclass in parentheses
fields.steps[].order: Biosynthetic step order; (1),(2) suffix indicates branching
fields.steps[].enzyme: Gene name(s): ; for complexes, , for uncertain order, / for alternatives, ? for unknown, Start for initial substrate
fields.steps[].module: Module number (0=loading), TE for thioesterase release
fields.steps[].nonlinearity: Domain skipping/inactive, iteration, module skipping, or trans-AT annotations
fields.steps[].product_smiles: SMILES notation of the product (PPant S replaced with OH)

BGC0000093.compound_name: Meilingmycin;Meilingmycin A;Meilingmycin B;Meilingmycin E;Meilingmycin D;Meilingmycin C

steps.enzyme: rapI, rapJ, rapM, rapN, rapO, rapQ
